quick_skim.title: Riemann invariant-based alternative WENO scheme for a two-layer thin film model
quick_skim.abstract: In this article, we develop a multi-dimensional two-layer thin film model extending the thin film model proposed in \cite{barthwal2025hyperbolic}. The model considered in \cite{barthwal2025hyperbolic} considered a very specific Marangoni scale by choosing Marangoni numbers in both layers to be $1$. We relax this condition here and prove that the obtained system possesses a full set of Riemann invariants. Based on these findings, we develop a Riemann Invariant-based Local Characteristic Decomposition WENO (RI-WENO) method for the two-layer thin film model in one and two dimensions. The method is built upon a specially designed variable transformation constructed from the derived Riemann invariants of the system. This transformation partially diagonalizes the governing equations and yields a sparse structure in the transformed eigenvector matrices. As a result, the proposed RI-WENO framework significantly reduces the computational cost of the standard Local Characteristic Decomposition WENO approach while retaining its strong capability to suppress spurious oscillations. Numerical experiments, including new benchmark test cases, demonstrate that the RI-WENO method achieves an effective balance between accuracy and computational efficiency, making it a promising and practical choice for solving the two-layer thin film model.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Develops a WENO method based on Riemann invariants for two-layer thin film model, relevant to falling film simulation.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 基于黎曼不变量为两层薄膜模型开发WENO方法，与降膜模拟相关
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 基于黎曼不变量为两层薄膜模型开发WENO方法，与降膜模拟相关
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 基于黎曼不变量为两层薄膜模型开发WENO方法，与降膜模拟相关
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper extends a two-layer thin film model by relaxing Marangoni number restrictions and proves the existence of a full set of Riemann invariants. A Riemann invariant-based local characteristic decomposition WENO method is then developed for accurate simulation of thin film flows in one and two dimensions, offering a robust tool for falling film hydrodynamics.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文放松了两层薄膜模型中马朗戈尼数的限制，证明了系统具有完全黎曼不变量集，并据此提出了一种基于黎曼不变量的局部特征分解WENO方法。该方法通过黎曼不变量构造变量变换，能够高精度模拟一维和二维薄膜流动，为降膜流动的数值研究提供了有效且稳定的计算手段，有助于深入理解薄膜动力学。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文放松了两层薄膜模型中马朗戈尼数的限制，证明了系统具有完全黎曼不变量集，并据此提出了一种基于黎曼不变量的局部特征分解WENO方法。该方法通过黎曼不变量构造变量变换，能够高精度模拟一维和二维薄膜流动，为降膜流动的数值研究提供了有效且稳定的计算手段，有助于深入理解薄膜动力学。
